diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,167 @@
+# Routing Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/hono.ts
+- Purpose: Main Hono class entry point that extends HonoBase, providing default router initialization with SmartRouter wrapping RegExpRouter and TrieRouter using constructor options for custom router selection.
+- Names noticed: Hono, HonoBase, HonoOptions, RegExpRouter, SmartRouter, TrieRouter, BlankEnv, BlankSchema, Env, Schema.
+- Simple note: 34 lines defining the Hono class with class-level default SmartRouter using nested routers.
+
+## src/hono-base.ts
+- Purpose: Base Hono module containing core request handling logic, route registration, middleware composition, and method handlers (get, post, put, delete, options, patch).
+- Names noticed: HonoBase, HonoOptions, compose, Context, Router, METHODS, METHOD_NAME_ALL, METHOD_NAME_ALL_LOWERCASE, Env, ErrorHandler, FetchEventLike, Handler, HandlerInterface, MergePath, MergeSchemaPath, MiddlewareHandler, MiddlewareHandlerInterface, Next, NotFoundHandler, OnHandlerInterface, RouterRoute, Schema, COMPOSED_HANDLER, getPath, getPathNoStrict, mergePath, notFoundHandler, errorHandler.
+- Simple note: 545 lines with full request-dispatch logic, composition, routing, and all HTTP method handlers.
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Module wrapper that exports the PatternRouter class from its router sub-module.
+- Names noticed: PatternRouter.
+- Simple note: 6 lines, single export statement routing to router.ts implementation.
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Pattern-based routing using compiled regular expressions to match paths, supports named parameters via `:name` syntax and optional parameters with `:name?` syntax.
+- Names noticed: Params, Result, Router, METHOD_NAME_ALL, UnsupportedPathError, Route type alias.
+- Simple note: 60 lines implementing add() with pattern compilation and match() iterating regex patterns with parameter extraction.
+
+## src/router/linear-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Module wrapper that exports the LinearRouter class from its router sub-module.
+- Names noticed: LinearRouter.
+- Simple note: 6 lines, single export statement.
+
+## src/router/linear-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Linear iteration-based routing matching routes in registration order, handles star `*` catch-all and named parameters with pattern validation via regex.
+- Names noticed: Router, METHOD_NAME_ALL, UnsupportedPathError, checkOptionalParameter, RegExpMatchArrayWithIndices, ROUTES_LOOP, splitPathRe, splitByStarRe.
+- Simple note: 144 lines with linear route matching loop, parameter extraction with lookahead regex for validation.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Module wrapper exporting RegExpRouter class and PreparedRegExpRouter with serialization utilities.
+- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, PreparedRegExpRouter, buildInitParams, serializeInitParams.
+- Simple note: 7 lines exporting router and prepared router factory utility.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Trie-based routing that precompiles routes into a single regular expression for fast matching, supports parameter index mapping and middleware assignment per HTTP method.
+- Names noticed: ParamIndexMap, Router, MESSAGE_MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT, UnsupportedPathError, checkOptionalParameter, HandlerData, StaticMap, Matcher, MatcherMap, match, emptyParam, Trie.
+- Simple note: 252 lines building compiled regex from route trie with handler indexing and matching.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts
+- Purpose: Defines matcher interface with static map for direct path lookup and dynamic map for regex fallback, plus match execution using regex with parameter index translation.
+- Names noticed: ParamIndexMap, Result, Router, HandlerData, StaticMap, Matcher, MatcherMap, emptyParam, match function.
+- Simple note: 33 lines defining types and match implementation checking static map then executing regex.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts
+- Purpose: Factory that precompiles all routes and handlers into static matchers and relocate map, enabling serialization and hot-loading of routers.
+- Names noticed: PreparedRegExpRouter, RelocateMap, buildInitParams, serializeInitParams.
+- Simple note: 165 lines with constructor, add() adding paths, buildAllMatchers() prebuilt, serialization for production deployment.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts
+- Purpose: Trie node structure for route trees with children, methods per node, patterns, and regex string generation via DFS traversal.
+- Names noticed: PATH_ERROR, ParamAssocArray, Context, Node, compareKey function.
+- Simple note: 162 lines recursive tree insertion building regex strings with variable index assignment.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts
+- Purpose: Root trie wrapper that preprocesses input path (expands pattern markers) and delegates to Node for insertion and buildRegExp() for output generation.
+- Names noticed: ParamAssocArray, Context, Node, ReplacementMap, Trie.
+- Simple note: 74 lines path preprocessing then delegating to Node class for construction.
+
+## src/router/smart-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Module wrapper that exports SmartRouter class from its router sub-module.
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter.
+- Simple note: 6 lines, single export statement.
+
+## src/router/smart-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Proxy router that delegates to a nested array of router instances, dynamically selecting the best match by trying routers in order until success.
+- Names noticed: Result, Router, MESSAGE_MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT, UnsupportedPathError, SmartRouter.
+- Simple note: 70 lines adding routes to array then matching sequentially across routers.
+
+## src/router/trie-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Module wrapper that exports TrieRouter class from its router sub-module.
+- Names noticed: TrieRouter.
+- Simple note: 6 lines, single export statement.
+
+## src/router/trie-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Trie tree router using path segments and method names as keys, performs BFS search during match to find all matching handler sets.
+- Names noticed: Result, Router, checkOptionalParameter, Node, TrieRouter.
+- Simple note: 28 lines wrapper over Node class with optional parameter handling.
+
+## src/router/trie-router/node.ts
+- Purpose: Tree node implementation with children, HTTP method handlers, and parameter patterns, implements BFS search for multi-match scenarios.
+- Names noticed: Params, Router, METHOD_NAME_ALL, Pattern, getPattern, splitPath, splitRoutingPath, HandlerSet, HandlerParamsSet.
+- Simple note: 234 lines insert method building tree with handlers, search method with BFS queueing and handler merging.
+
+## src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts
+- Purpose: Unit tests for trie node behavior including basic matching, parameter extraction, wildcard handling, regex patterns, multi-match scenarios, and sort order.
+- Names noticed: describe, test, it, expect, Node (imported).
+- Simple note: 816 lines covering many path patterns and match edge cases.
+
+## src/router/common.case.test.ts
+- Purpose: Shared test suite utilities providing common test cases for all router implementations with beforeEach setup using runTest helper.
+- Names noticed: RunnerTestSuite, ParamIndexMap, Params, Router.
+- Simple note: 882 lines with suite hierarchy extraction and comprehensive test scenarios.
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: PatternRouter test cases using common test suite, skips tests unsupported by pattern approach like trailing slash handling and duplicate param names.
+- Names noticed: UnsupportedPathError, runTest, PatternRouter.
+- Simple note: 42 lines with skip configuration and trailing slash support.
+
+## src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: LinearRouter test cases using common test suite, skips tests unsupported by linear approach like complex params and trailing slash.
+- Names noticed: UnsupportedPathError, runTest, LinearRouter.
+- Simple note: 69 lines with explicit skip for unsupported cases.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: RegExpRouter test cases using common test suite, skips unsupported cases like duplicate params and complex capturing groups, includes return type test.
+- Names noticed: ParamStash, UnsupportedPathError, runTest, RegExpRouter.
+- Simple note: 141 lines with return type and unsupported path error scenarios.
+
+## src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: SmartRouter test cases using common suite, delegates to RegExpRouter + TrieRouter combo for all base tests.
+- Names noticed: runTest, RegExpRouter, TrieRouter, SmartRouter.
+- Simple note: 13 lines minimal wrapper test.
+
+## src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: TrieRouter test cases using common test suite wrapping Node tests via runTest helper.
+- Names noticed: runTest, TrieRouter.
+- Simple note: 8 lines delegating to Node tests.
+
+## Cross-File Checklist
+
+- **pattern-router**: src/router/pattern-router/index.ts (re-export), src/router/pattern-router/router.ts (core), src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts (tests only)
+- **linear-router**: src/router/linear-router/index.ts (re-export), src/router/linear-router/router.ts (core), src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts (tests only)
+- **reg-exp-router**: src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts (re-export + PreparedRouter), src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts (core), src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts (types + match), src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts (serialization), src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts (trie nodes), src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts (root trie), src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts (tests)
+- **smart-router**: src/router/smart-router/index.ts (re-export), src/router/smart-router/router.ts (core), src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts (tests delegate to reg-exp + trie)
+- **trie-router**: src/router/trie-router/index.ts (re-export), src/router/trie-router/router.ts (wrapper over Node), src/router/trie-router/node.ts (tree node + search), src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts (tests for Node), src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts (delegates to Node tests)
+
+---
+
+**File Paths Referenced (27 total):**
+
+1. src/hono.ts
+2. src/hono-base.ts
+3. src/router/pattern-router/index.ts
+4. src/router/pattern-router/router.ts
+5. src/router/linear-router/index.ts
+6. src/router/linear-router/router.ts
+7. src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts
+8. src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts
+9. src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts
+10. src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts
+11. src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts
+12. src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts
+13. src/router/smart-router/index.ts
+14. src/router/smart-router/router.ts
+15. src/router/trie-router/index.ts
+16. src/router/trie-router/router.ts
+17. src/router/trie-router/node.ts
+18. src/router/common.case.test.ts
+19. src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts
+20. src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts
+21. src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts
+22. src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts
+23. src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts
+24. src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts
+
+**Commands Run:**
+- mkdir -p bench-artifacts (created directory)
+- read all 24 listed files successfully
+
+**Verification Status:**
+- Directory bench-artifacts created
+- All files read successfully (0 errors)
+- Document written to bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md
\ No newline at end of file

parts.text:
"Benchmark task: routing-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md. This is a read/write endurance task, not a clever debugging task. First create the bench-artifacts directory if it does not exist. Then read every file in this exact list before writing the final document: src/hono.ts, src/hono-base.ts, src/router/pattern-router/index.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.ts, src/router/linear-router/index.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts, src/router/smart-router/index.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/index.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.ts, src/router/common.case.test.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts. The output file must be long but mechanically simple. Start with a title '# Routing Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a section whose heading is exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write three bullets: '- Purpose: ...', '- Names noticed: ...', and '- Simple note: ...'. Keep the notes plain and safe; do not change source code. After the per-file sections, add '## Cross-File Checklist' with one bullet per router family: pattern-router, linear-router, reg-exp-router, smart-router, trie-router. Include exact file paths in the final answer and report that only bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md was created.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer."
